script:
Q: Where should I put the extra extension cords?
A: In the top drawer.
B: The deadline is strict.
C: After today's meeting.
explanation: Câu hỏi 'Where' cần một cụm từ chỉ nơi chốn. 'In the top drawer' là đáp án chỉ vị trí hợp lý nhất.

script:
Q: Where are the training materials being distributed?
A: Please pass me the stapler.
B: In room 403.
C: On the job training.
explanation: Hỏi về địa điểm (Where), 'In room 403' cung cấp thông tin phòng họp cụ thể.

script:
Q: Where was the company picnic held?
A: In April.
B: Refreshments will be provided.
C: At a park next to a lake.
explanation: Hỏi địa điểm tổ chức (Where), 'At a park' là nơi chốn phù hợp.

script:
Q: When will the meeting be held?
A: After lunch.
B: Yes, it will be.
C: Next to the conference room.
explanation: Câu hỏi 'When' cần mốc thời gian. 'After lunch' là câu trả lời đúng.

script:
Q: Who's presenting the sales report at the next meeting?
A: I think Jason is.
B: It's already been sold.
C: At the nearest port.
explanation: Câu hỏi 'Who' tìm người thực hiện. 'Jason' là tên người phù hợp.

script:
Q: Who's responsible for the report?
A: Sometime in the afternoon.
B: In the news report.
C: It's John Draper.
explanation: Hỏi về người chịu trách nhiệm, 'John Draper' là câu trả lời chỉ người.

script:
Q: Who are you going to send on the business trip?
A: I've picked Susan in accounting.
B: It was a very rewarding trip.
C: At the start of next year.
explanation: Hỏi về đối tượng (Who), đáp án cung cấp tên 'Susan'.

script:
Q: How often should I replace the battery in this device?
A: It is in place.
B: At least once a year.
C: He often goes on business trips.
explanation: Câu hỏi tần suất 'How often', 'At least once a year' là câu trả lời chính xác.

script:
Q: You've been to Japan before, haven't you?
A: After 3:30 p.m.
B: I prefer Japanese food.
C: No, never.
explanation: Câu hỏi đuôi xác nhận trải nghiệm, 'No, never' là câu trả lời phủ định hợp lý.

script:
Q: How much longer do you need on this project?
A: About 10 pages long.
B: Roughly half an hour.
C: In my office soon.
explanation: Hỏi về thời lượng còn lại (How much longer), 'Half an hour' chỉ thời gian.

script:
Q: The files have all been submitted, haven't they?
A: Yes, about 2 hours ago.
B: I'll submit my application then.
C: Mr. Peters wants to see them.
explanation: Xác nhận việc nộp file, đáp án xác nhận 'Yes' kèm mốc thời gian.

script:
Q: Who is interested in working overtime this weekend?
A: It won't go over well with them.
B: I don't mind coming in on Saturday.
C: Jason's meeting his friends on the weekend.
explanation: Hỏi ai sẵn sàng làm thêm, 'I don't mind' thể hiện sự đồng ý.

script:
Q: How would you like me to prepare your coffee?
A: She's making copies.
B: From the local cafe.
C: Black with no sugar.
explanation: Hỏi về cách thức pha chế, 'Black with no sugar' mô tả đúng loại đồ uống.

script:
Q: What should I bring to David's birthday party?
A: The party will take place at 6:00 p.m.
B: Send her a thank you card.
C: Let's discuss it after lunch.
explanation: Đây là câu trả lời gián tiếp, đề nghị thảo luận sau thay vì đưa ra vật dụng cụ thể.

script:
Q: I don't think that I can make it to the conference this afternoon.
A: I think it's about plans for the next year.
B: I'll be there, too.
C: Why is that?
explanation: Phản hồi tự nhiên khi nghe đối phương báo vắng mặt là hỏi lý do 'Why is that?'.

script:
Q: When did you come back?
A: To my hometown.
B: The day before yesterday.
C: Next weekend.
explanation: Câu hỏi quá khứ 'When did', cần đáp án quá khứ 'The day before yesterday'.

script:
Q: Do you know how the weather will be today?
A: I feel good today.
B: It will be raining in the afternoon.
C: I don't know whether he'll come today.
explanation: Hỏi về thời tiết, đáp án cung cấp thông tin về mưa.

script:
Q: Where can I pick up the catalog?
A: Sure, I'll pick you up later.
B: Next to the entrance.
C: Late this afternoon.
explanation: Hỏi địa điểm lấy danh mục, 'Next to the entrance' là vị trí chính xác.

script:
Q: Have you delivered the package to Mr. Jones or should I get someone to do it?
A: The post office is just across the street.
B: I'll hand it over to him after I finish typing this document.
C: Yes, I packed my suitcase already.
explanation: Câu hỏi lựa chọn, người nói xác nhận sẽ tự thực hiện việc giao hàng.

script:
Q: Where are the assembly instructions?
A: I don't know how to assemble it.
B: I put it in the top drawer.
C: The instructor will be here soon.
explanation: Hỏi vị trí tài liệu, đáp án chỉ nơi cất giữ là 'top drawer'.

script:
Q: When are you leaving for the airport?
A: There's no fee.
B: Around 11:00.
C: Does this bus go to the airport?
explanation: Hỏi thời gian khởi hành, đáp án 'Around 11:00' là mốc giờ phù hợp.

script:
Q: Did you buy this jacket at a discount?
A: They're in the men's department.
B: A winter ski vacation.
C: Yes, it was half off.
explanation: Xác nhận mua hàng giảm giá, 'half off' tương đương với việc giảm 50%.

script:
Q: Where is he going?
A: She's going to the store.
B: I'm going to the store.
C: He's going to the store.
explanation: Lặp lại đúng chủ ngữ 'He' để trả lời về địa điểm.

script:
Q: Where did John go today?
A: Yes, I'll talk to him right away.
B: He doesn't know it yet.
C: He's in his office.
explanation: Hỏi vị trí của người (John), 'In his office' là nơi chốn.

script:
Q: How did you find the movie?
A: It was around the corner.
B: It was very scary.
C: We might be late for the movie.
explanation: Hỏi về cảm nhận bộ phim, 'scary' (đáng sợ) là tính từ miêu tả cảm nhận.

script:
Q: What time does our flight leave?
A: By 3:00.
B: About 3 or four times a day.
C: Is scheduled to take off at 7:30.
explanation: Hỏi về giờ bay, đáp án cung cấp giờ cất cánh 7:30.

script:
Q: Did you hear about John's promotion?
A: The sales promotion was successful.
B: Yes, he is being recognized for the great work he did on the project.
C: No, I have not heard anything from him yet.
explanation: Xác nhận tin thăng chức của đồng nghiệp và bổ sung lý do tích cực.

script:
Q: Will you be going away this summer?
A: Most likely in June.
B: I will be away later.
C: He's coming soon.
explanation: Hỏi về dự định mùa hè, 'June' là tháng trong mùa hè phù hợp.

script:
Q: Have you finished writing the monthly report?
A: Please rate clearly.
B: It's almost complete.
C: Yes, it'll be finished by Monday.
explanation: Hỏi về tiến độ hoàn thành, 'almost complete' (gần xong) là phản hồi đúng.

script:
Q: You haven't seen the Jenkins report, have you?
A: No, I haven't.
B: No, I have.
C: Yes, I haven't.
explanation: Câu hỏi đuôi phủ định, trả lời phủ định 'No, I haven't' là đúng cấu trúc.

script:
Q: The movie is set to start at 5:00, right?
A: We can go to another screening if you'd like.
B: It was fantastic, wasn't it?
C: I've never visited a movie set before.
explanation: Trả lời gián tiếp: đề xuất suất chiếu khác gợi ý rằng suất 5:00 có thể không kịp.

script:
Q: Can you load the luggage by yourself or do you need my help?
A: If it's not too much trouble.
B: Yes, I packed my own bags.
C: No, it's not loaded.
explanation: Đồng ý nhận sự giúp đỡ một cách lịch sự bằng cụm 'If it's not too much trouble'.

script:
Q: Shouldn't we look at the other products on the market?
A: Yes, we should.
B: No, the market's closed.
C: I didn't see it.
explanation: Đồng tình với lời đề nghị 'Shouldn't we...'.

script:
Q: Should we purchase new fax machines for the office or get multi-function printers?
A: We need more computers for the new employees.
B: Because the printer isn't working.
C: I like the new office building.
explanation: Câu trả lời gián tiếp thường gặp: đưa ra một nhu cầu khác thay vì chọn 2 cái đề bài cho.

script:
Q: Could I borrow your cell phone for a local call?
A: Yes, thanks for your advice.
B: She's on the other line at the moment.
C: Sure. Push the green button to send.
explanation: Đồng ý cho mượn điện thoại kèm theo hướng dẫn sử dụng nhanh.

script:
Q: That cake looks really delicious.
A: Would you like some pieces?
B: Would you like a piece?
C: Do you like a piece?
explanation: Lời mời lịch sự 'Would you like a piece?' là phản hồi phù hợp nhất sau lời khen.
